note: Goes before the verb: siempre trabajo = I always work.
Two words, one idea: a veces como tarde = sometimes I eat late.
normalmente desayuno a las siete = I usually have breakfast at seven.
semana = week, so todas las semanas = every week.
los + a day (in plural) means every week on that day: los domingos = on Sundays, los lunes = on Mondays.
casi = almost, so casi siempre = almost always.
casi + nunca (never, which you know) = almost never.
una vez = one time; a la semana = a week.
